mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file_record (file_id, module, original_file_name, file_path, file_size, upload_time, create_user_id, create_user_name) VALUES (#{fileId}, #{module}, #{originalFileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{uploadTime}, #{createUserId}, #{createUserName})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM file_record WHERE file_id IN
#{item}
